zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Scarisbrick於1294年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾韋斯特 藍卡爾時，他的父親Gilbert Scarisbrick32歲，母親Lady Scarisbrick27歲。他於1321年與Joan De Kirkby在英國英格蘭藍卡爾韋斯特 藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1359年9月23日在他的家鄉享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Scarisbrick was born in 1294, in West Lancashire, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Scarisbrick, was 32 and his mother, Lady Scarisbrick, was 27. He married Joan De Kirkby in 1321, in West Lancashire, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 September 1359, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Scarisbrick est né en 1294, à West Lancashire, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Scarisbrick, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Scarisbrick, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan De Kirkby en 1321, à West Lancashire, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1359, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

Er hat 1321 in West Lancashire, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Joan De Kirkby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Scarisbrickが1294年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウエスト ランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert Scarisbrickは32歳，母Lady Scarisbrickは27歳であった。1321年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウエスト ランカシュアイアでJoan De Kirkbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年9月23日に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Scarisbrick(이)가 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 웨스트 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Scarisbrick(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Scarisbrick(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 웨스트 랭카실르에서 Joan De Kirkby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 9월 23일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Joan De Kirkby в 1321 г. в местности вест ланкашир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.
